review_text:
Great location  and clean park with legend field workers around the grounds  but some of the office staff are a tad rude to be honest.
Double booked peoples  sites with no notification or consult . Over the course of our stay when the park was empty in a lot of places packed people on top of each  other and didnt spread them out🤦 .
My favourite place to holiday in NSW
What a great spot, so quiet with friendly people and staff. Our cabin was fantastic with everything you need. It has as nice and close to all amenities and shops

We had the best time with our whole camp crew. Great location!! Beautiful Creek for water fun, bridge nearby for jumping into creek too. Horse shoe bay beach not far either. Camp site is not too cramped and nicely spaced out. Very clean, neat & tidy. Friendly and efficient staff too!!

The park and the cabin we booked were amazing. Unfortunately, some of the staff were quite rude and not very accommodating, possibly due to the Easter long weekend being busy, but it still impacted our experience. Emma, however, was lovely and stood out for her friendliness.

Since returning home, I’ve spoken to others who have stayed here and had similar experiences with staff, which is disappointing, especially considering we live four hours away, so word does tend to travel.

Had my bike stolen and asked to review cctv footage and help watch but wouldn't allow it
Park still has not reviewed and has not followed up or helped pretty poor if you ask me
Would not stay here again considering the lack of care for their guest
The location is nice and relaxing, but the bed sheets were not clean. I couldn’t sleep because my legs and feet were itching from bed bugs, which was really frustrating
Great spot with heaps of different things to do....not many bike riders and very quiet park.....mostly retirees....with same life attitudes
One of the best.  Caravan Parks we visited in Australien. Fantastic staff, ping Pong, everything clean. the Location is wonferful as well.

We stayed one night in a 2 bed standard cabin as a stop over for a road trip.
The cabin was very tired, run down and in need of a deep clean.
We had filthy feet from walking around inside the cabin.
There were stains on walls, spiders and webs throughout the cabin.
We felt dirty the entire time we were there. We were glad to checkout early in the morning and didn’t get to chat to staff upon checkout.

Absolutely fantastic holiday park! Booked a grass powered site and upon arrival it had been raining heavily so before I had to ask the reception person (sorry forgot their name but she was a superstar) had already moved me to a slab site at no extra cost! Check-in staff were fantastic, extremely friendly and so accommodating! Site is in a perfect location with a short stroll along the beautiful river estuary to town! Doggie friendly park and 2 amazing leash free dog beaches within walking distance and both not busy at all! All other staff I encountered were lovely and very friendly and the facilities were super clean and well equipped! South West Rocks is a lovely town steeped in traditional
aboriginal culture which I love.. I even got some bunya nuts from a local aboriginal fella… luckily the camp kitchen had an air fryer so I didn’t have to spend an hour boiling them! 😂.. highly recommend, very well priced considering the amazing facilities! We will be back! Thank-you so much! ❤️
Great location, right near the river!!!!

Excellent staff very friendly and helpful.
Great NYE fireworks for those staying at the Village.
Great security and quality surrounding fences.
Like the way they don't tolerate excessive noise or rowdy behaviour keep it family friendly.
Lovely clean pool.

Good campground close to the river. Some campsites have river views which looked amazing - we weren’t that lucky though and quite close to the road.
The amenities closest to us were quite new and clean but sometimes too busy.

Awesome experience,  from the fantastic professionals at the office,  to our powered site 20 meters from the creek.
Birdlife is abundant,  great for a Birdwatcher like myself.
Loved it.

One of the cleanest locations and amenities, relaxing, well organised for late arrivals. Highly recommend
Thanks to the park team, we will be back for sure

What a wonderful time we had.We were upgraded to a beautiful unit(see photos). We were very impressed with unit grounds and friendlyness of staff and other holidaymakers.
The scenery around South West Rocks is amazing and credit must be given to Kempsey council for the excellent disabled rail and walkways every where. It enabled you to safely get down into the river to paddle or swim.
Fantastic park on the river. Clean amenities and well maintained roads, camp kitchen and pool area. Definitely top 10 park I have been to. Also only a short walk (1.5km) to beaches and town centre.

Emma truly went above and beyond for us. She was incredibly down-to-earth, genuinely understood our situation (car breakdown), and treated us with so much kindness. Her support made a stressful situation feel so much easier, and we are incredibly grateful.
Not only was she helpful and professional, but she also brought a personal touch, from taking the time to listen, to showing us her beautiful veggie garden, which really speaks to the care she puts into everything she does.
Thank you for everything, Emma. You really made our stay, and it’s people like you who make Ingenia such a wonderful place to return to. We hope management knows what a gem they have!
Very big park, large sites, great place to stay to explore. Staff friendly & helpful.
Where we choose to stay in South West Rocks. Doesn't have the view that some others have but is in a great location.
Great spot for a family heaps to do for the kids
Hi, stayed 2 nights in a 2 room cabin,  lovely staff,  great park, good location,  the cabin was old and tied, $289 dollars a night way 2 expensive.

Cabins were so nice and had everything we needed. The beds were comfortable.
Location is great, walking distance to town and beaches. Kids loved the pool!!

Wifi wasn’t great so best to leave the work behind and enjoy time for yourself or with the ones you love in beautiful SWR. Thanks team.

Well presented cabins being clean and tidy.
Excellent staff.
The only thing that was wrong was that we had requested to all be in the same area when booked months ago and we are all over the park.
Powered site, good clean amenities.

We recently stayed for 4 nights in a premium ensuite site. Enjoyed our stay! Kids loved exploring the paperbark trees nearby. Nice big sites and very friendly staff. Although 10-15mins from the main beach, we actually enjoyed the walk in. Was a little more sheltered from the wind than in town on the front on windy days. We were close to boat ramp so made for a bit of noise early in morning but nothing to bad. Would recommend!

Stayed in the cabin near the waterfront , with bbq area included
Amazing stay , beds were so comfortable
fully self contained with all of the kitchen facilities you need
near the river , quite , short walk to town
very well maintained park
will visit again soon
We caravanning. Lovely and very friendly caravan park. Good location, very scenic along the Mcleay River.  Only downside were the midges

Amazing, helpful staff.

A great park, the nicest Ingenia I have been to.

Will be back!
Awesome place. Clean tidy and fun. The waterslide in the pool is a win for kids.
Nice dog friendly park. Nice walk into town from the park. Happy with the amenities.

We had a caravan site beautiful clean park well kept. We were with our caravan club and they made us all feel very welcome. The park itself caters for all people, plenty for the kids to do. The staff are really friendly and helpful. The park itself is close town and all things to see. Thank you Ingenia for making our stay memorable 😊

We chose this park as we have a TAWK membership so took advantage of kids stay free and so glad we did. The staff were amazing, Em in the office was so lovely to my little boy each time we went in and made an effort to make him feel valued as well. The young blonde lady in the grounds was also lovely and smiled and waved every time we saw her. We will definitely be back!

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
Large caravan site - close proximity to town.
We will be back
Awesome place and stay

Was a shame. Had a pleasant stay. We spoke to reception the day prior to leaving to ask for a later checkout.
And was able to get a later checkout for 1045am, which we were happy with.
Received a call at 1005am the morning of check out saying we need to leave as there is a group coming in at 11am. We explained the situation but the reception said they have no notes on file. We wouldn't have stayed longer if it wasn't approved. That dampened our stay with tho rudeness of that phone call.
Utterly disappointing.

This was one of our most expensive stays to date along the East coast.Amenitites all good and very clean but we felt it was very overpriced for a caravan powered sight.We upgraded to a premium waterfront sight,don't think it was worth the extra money.
Cabins are clean and well maintained  park caters for all you could need and service was helpful and friendly

The second time I spent four days on holiday here and stayed in Holiday House No.50.The staff at the reception desk was very friendly and gave five-star customer service.The house was very clean and tidy .Thank you again to the staff。                                                                                      I gave a 5-star review 5 years ago , but today I'm disappointed to give it 2 star, Why ? I have been going to this resort every july for 4 nights for 7 Years, but the quality of the Resort facilities has been declining , This year I can no longer toletate it, I hope the management will see my review and improve it , I also hope that the front desk staff will not be as friendly as brfore。
Fabulous location. Fabulous amenities. Thank you for your support and assistance with the adverse weather conditions

The best place to stay
Can’t believe we paid $35 last year and $65 a night this year though ..
Amenities spotless great area safe close to shops with a house 2 km walk
Everything you need in town
Third yr staying here
Just too expensive to continue staying -/

Very friendly staff in the office - always happy and willing to assist. Thanks very much to the staff for making the Bondi IRB team feel so welcome.
Fantastic cabins - very warm, clean and spacious.

Friendly and helpful staff at check-in. We gave a 4 due to the price ( after staying in 33 Parks on this trip it has been the most expensive one) The Park is well maintained and nicely set up but didn't justify the price ( even during school holidays) Park was quite empty, and peaceful.
Heated pool, clean Amenities and kitchen.
Artificial grass at camp-site with slab nice set up, no point to put grey water pipe on our area ( other area near river had) we used garden bed.
We did enjoy our 2 nights and can recommend the Park.

Just stayed here in a pet friendly cabin !! From the moment you arrive you are greeted by the most helpful and friendly staff who go out of their way to make sure you have a memorable stay ! We had a pet friendly cabin and it was lovely, so clean and very compact with great facilities ! We absolutely loved stayed here great location to be able to walk to the beach watch the sunset and into town ! Will definitely be coming back 🤩🤩
Terrific venue. Plenty for the kids to do, everything was clean, tidy and well presented. They even made the weather nice for us.

I rarely write reviews but this caravan park warrants it. Great layout, great facilities, particularly the pool and amenities areas and the professional nature of the staff. Without exception they are friendly ,helpful, and smart. [ No I am not related to any of them nor am I in their employment.]  Congratulations to Dan and the team . A special shout out to Brian . Mike T.
We were impressed by campground tranquil settings along Back Creek! Ideal for nature lovers!
A beautiful camp ground. Excellent location close to a river. Nice facilities. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Will stay again when around the area.
Our Favourite family holiday spot. We live over 4hrs away but have been back 4 or 5 times.
Great place for holidays, and only a hop skip away from a beautiful walk away leading straight into town

We stayed in a cabin for one night and it was so lovely and spacious. Very clean and had everything we needed. The facilities here were really good - large games room, pool, bbq areas. All great! We went for a lovely walk by the creek and along the ocean boardwalk at the end of the day. Was a really great stay and location.

Emma in the office could do with more customer service training her manner
when asked for assistance was dismissive and gave the impression it was to much. Staff need to monitor the age of children in the pool,on numerous occasions there were children under 12yr old unsupervised in this area.

Great park.
Great location
Friendly staff.
Excellent park, large sites, great pool, friendly staff and clean amenities
Fresh seafood delivery to the door twice daily

We stayed in an executive cabin , it was great . Full kitchen two bedrooms, air con, coffee machine, cooking equipment, washing machine , dryer your home away from home.||Only a quick drive into town , staff very friendly. ||Had no issues at all , would definitely stay again

Excellent site to stay and Emma in reception was a great host. Thanks to all the staff,
Danny & Lisa Brooks

In fairness it is a great caravan park with excellent facilities but the adjoining neighbourhood is VERY dodgy. On our very first night here we were awoken on multiple occasions by car alarms. This morning we find out that there were 2 attempted car thefts, one successful car theft and a lady’s handbag stolen FROM INSIDE HER CARAVAN with a large amount of cash involved. We are booked in here until mid next week but I’m not sure we’ll be staying. Such a shame because as I said it’s a great park but security here needs to be seriously ramped up.

Great holiday Park. Stayed two nights at a cabin. Super comfy beds, friendly and helpful staff. Pool has a water slide which is very enjoyable, the local beach has a small bay which is perfect for children.

This is a brilliant location. It had everything; from the stunning walks into town, to the facilities for both adults and children  being wonderful, it was a delight to have stayed. Staff were very helpful and friendly too and always willing to help.

אתר קרוואנים וביקתות להשכרה, מצוין.
ביקתה גדולה כוללת את כל  הציוד הנדרש ממוקמת על קו המים.

We loved the location. It is close to the river and town, and the beaches in the area are great swimming spots. Unfortunately, there is very little security in the park. There is open access to the river and, therefore, the town. Crime was high during my stay. My fishing gear, other campers' bikes, and one visitor's wallet were stolen.   The sites are generous and held up well to several storms with large downpours.  Very little activities were available for the kids with their kid's club.  The activities room is a good space as is the pool.  A bakery van was supposed to come around I was informed, however I didn't see it.  The proximity to the lake was a godsend on hot nights.

Stayed here numerous times over the last few years. Never any complaints from family members

The sites are quite spacious. Our site this year allowed space for our van, tent and swags. We backed onto the river and the view was beautiful.

Amenities are pretty standard but well maintained.

Only downside is how busy the pool gets in school holidays. Would love another pool. Maybe an adult only pool.

Regular retailers drive through daily to sell oysters, prawns, bread and sweet treats also which is convenient.
Very well maintained holiday park. Great facilities, plenty of kids activities. Clean, large caravan sites. Walking distance to town.
An amazing holiday park,very clean well equipped cabins, easy walk to shops,lovely swimming pool..
All good. Fully equipped, clean and comfortable. Nice and helpful operator. Good family accommodation.

Very clean caravan park. Amenities so clean.
Short walk into town which is great. Big caravan sites. Friendly staff.
Will be staying again!

This was a pretty park in walking distance to town and beaches. We stayed in a superior waterfront cabin and had a lovely view of a river and gums. It was very peaceful. The cabin was well appointed and very clean with a deck and outdoor setting facing the view. The staff were extremely helpful and friendly. We loved our stay and will be back!!
Nice pool an games room, short walk to water
Rooms are OK, but the TV in the loungeroom is half of the size of my laptop and very dumb, no streaming service at all. It's also very expensive for its location and cabin size.

With 8 adults and 7 children over three generations, we booked 4 cabins.
The cabins were well positioned and clean.
The park itself provided everything we needed to have a fun and relaxing holiday for all ages.

This holiday park is absolutely beautiful. Friendly staff, quiet park. Emma at the reception was absolutely amazing. loved her!! well maintained kitchen and bathroom areas. Stunning pool, and lots to do for the kids. definitely 5 out of 5 stars

Stayed in a non powdered site for 4 days.
Nice and clean and friendly staff.
Great place, lovely area

This park is a good well priced option. We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin which was more than adequate for the 3 of us. The cabin was located amongst a lot of caravans and it may get noisy at night , luckily they all went to sleep before midnight. |The cabin was very clean, wifi was good, the shower was very good. There are facilities close by if your inside toilet is being occupied.
Got the premium spot for our caravan. Stayed for 3 nights and found it generally very quiet. Quick creek side stroll to the beach.
As I arrived late the staff have a late arrival safe and they text you the access code so you can have access very helpful clean facilities Cheers.
Second best holiday park in the world.

There would be few parks that have consistent high standards and mature staff go above and beyond. Visited with a group of over 40 for second time and facilities are well maintained and in excellent repair. All outdoor staff really understand what service is all about. once the cabin upgrade is complete this will be a pretty unique venue. Pity food venues in SWR havent got the message on service and value for money

Our first time staying at this park in SW Rocks (have previously stayed at Horseshoe Bay), we were very impressed.  Extremely friendly and helpful Reception staff, who provided a wealth of local knowledge and recommendations for places to see / eat at!!
We were on Site 1 for 4 nights - right at the park entrance which was probably a tad noisier than we planned, but certainly not excessively so, as a bonus the site is huge, has a lovely artificial grass mat and is in a prime position for the onsite Coffee van, we would quite happily have this Site again.  Amenities are quite close and whilst not new, we're always spotlessly clean.  Easy 10 minute walk into town.  Would recommend the Heritage Guest House and Cafè for a delicious breakfast!!
Has been added to our, we'll be back list!!
Great place. Loved it.
We had a wonderful time during our stay , looking forward to returning for another visit

Gorgeous cabins,  beautiful views and affordable, the only complaint is the spa jets/filter was a bit grimy with mould so just had a spa without jets on. Other than that we were very very happy with our stay

Misleading Cancellation Policy - Be Cautious!

I recently booked a stay at [property/park name] and was quite disappointed with their cancellation policy. Despite my booking well over 90 days before my planned stay, they refused to refund the first night's deposit, citing their Terms & Conditions.

While they bolded the "90 days" clause, they failed to make it clear that this referred to a non-refundable deposit. This lack of clarity led to confusion, as most accommodations offer refunds for cancellations such as Airbnb,  made well in advance. And there is no any chance to get full refund.
I've previously booked with them outside of the Christmas period and found their cancellation terms much more straightforward, which only added to my frustration.

If you’re considering booking here, make sure to double-check all their terms, as it’s easy to misinterpret their policies. If anyone else has encountered this issue, I encourage you to share your experience and consider reporting it to NSW Fair Trading for further review.

We stayed for a week on a powered site in our caravan and loved it so we booked for 3 weeks next year. The park is in a great location, the amenities are always spotless and are not closed for cleaning at 10.00 am for cleaning like most parks, they are cleaned late at night and there is another facility available if required. The fishing in the nearby Macleay River is fantastic.
Ok they need to trim trees to avoid SAP on CARAVAN and  CARS

Large park with good facilities a short walk from the town.
But site allocation by reception staff was disappointing. We were allocated 69, but asked if we could have sunnier site 59 or 66. But the van arriving behind us was put on 66 even though they had specifically booked 69 for 9 days. We were told 59 was unavailable so we just did a swap with the van on 66. All good but in the 3 days we stayed there, 59 was empty. Go figure!
Lovely place. Enjoyed our stay.
Lovely little park with great facilities. Friendly staff. Thank you.

Have been travelling since August last year....from NSW to VIC and SA. Stopped at INGENIA on way back north. This has to be one of the best parks . Staff friendly n helpful. Amenities that are cleaned morning AND night. Good camp kitchen not far from large lounge /games room plus bar.b.q area with pizza oven.Pool area also nearby. Stayed 2 weeks on a powered site at a reasonable cost.Park is close to town within walking distance.. along a nice board walk.Local area has everything you need for a relaxing holiday. Will definitely stay at other INGENIA parks on our travels. Thank you
Great holiday park ..remember to listen out for the bell ..Jenkins oysters .COME-N-GET-EM!!!
Great park with friendly efficient staff. Very clean and well maintained, on the river with easy access to town and beaches. Very quiet this time of the year.

No hot water >5mins during roughly 5-6am @ 2celsius ambient so we left around 6am to go get hot coffee maybe find hot water and came back @ 9.20am before our 10am checkout to return key and get refund for next day we had pre-paid. The song and dance manager put on was Oscar worthy 😂 he was absolutely never going to give a refund regardless of circumstance lol
Was told because hot water works now sun shining @19celsius ambient that I’m a liar, even told me a plumber was here right now to prove me wrong 😝 despite all water pipes ofc now prewarmed by me and every1 else in the park for last 3 hours+ beforehand 🤪
Don’t expect to get money back if u prepay a day and leave earlier before checkout times and just don’t expect warm water early morning in winter❄️
Stayed 2 nights here nice park and cabin,may return another time.

Recently stayed at South West Rocks Ingenia caravan park.
Fantastic ladies at reception!
Found the facilities to be spotless & all types of accomodation catered for.
Large caravan sites, ensuite sites & tent sites.
Dogs made most welcome too with a dog wash provided.
After leaving we received a call from park manager David to warn us that our electricity lead would be burnt out as the active pin was found in the power box! He was concerned about our safety. Most impressed.
Sure enough it was burnt out. Can't believe I didn't note it when disconnecting! 🙄
Would give this park 5 stars for customer service.
The kindest reception lady I've ever come across. Great location. Awesome facilities for families. Unfortunately we could only stay one night which just wasn't enough !!!
Me and my son had al wonderful time at this caravan park the ground where nice and clean the garden was nice too the staff was friendly..best holiday ever thank you 👍

Great place to stay!.Nice and quite when we where there.Dont have to travel far at all to get into town 10 minute walk or 2 minute drive.
Definitely will be returning!.
Great park, big sites, beautifully clean amenities, friendly helpful office staff. We will be back.

We recently visited this park and was suprised with just how much there was to do for the kids. The jumping pillow and pool are a great way to fill in your days. There was a mix up with reservations but was sorted out with a quick trip to the office to rectify. MOSQUITOES!! my golly gosh they could have picked you up and carried you away. Bring mozzie spray if camping here! We were layered and still come home covered in bites.

There was one lady behind the desk in particular that was obscenely rude. She spoke in an awful way to customers and was busy talking to other staff leaving guests waiting while she was chatting. She was incredibly rude. The park amenities and overall site was amazing. We would love to come back however there is no way we will come back until speed bumps are put around the park. Our site was right next to the park so there was always children everywhere. However guests driving past were doing well over the speed limit. We are a travelling family who travel all over Aus full time and we have NEVER been to a caravan park where the speeding was such an issue. We brought it up to admin and a group txt was sent to all guests but didn't help at all. I child will be killed there one day it's so bad. Every second car was speeding, I pulled up multiple cars for it and we resorted to throwing balls under cars to hopefully shock the driver to slow down. It was so so bad. Speed bumps or we could never go back. Hoping that the lady behind the desk that was rude was just having a bad day but it was not great to witness... such a shame as its a great park. You would also think for the price that they would have a security guard at night. A group of indigenous children came through the park stealing one night and guests had to take it upon themselves to escort them out of the park.

Didn't enjoy the room at all. Main issues were Shower had rusty railings and floor was dirty. Was not a modern shower. Rooms did not feel clean at all. Blinds had stains on them so you had to be careful not to rub against them.

The cabin we stayed at was good location close into town and driving to Coles was 5 mins.
Good view if no Caravan's was on front of our view.
Warm and wonderful welcome. Quiet at night and the river is a nice place to go fishing. Walking distance to shops and beach. The cabin was clean and had everything you need

We stayed in our caravan right near the water, site 56. Beautiful spot and the park is clean with all amenities being well looked after. Lots of thin things for kids to do as well.
Highly recommended
We pitched our 6 man tent on a powered lawn site, stayed 3 nights, and found the facilities to be very good.
Beautiful park. Spotless and clean. Great amenities and TV room, stunning pool. And the blonde lady on reception is lovely, so helpful, nothing is too much trouble. Highly recommended
Very nice caravan park, clean & friendly staff.

"Ingenia Holliday Park in South West Rocks is a delightful holiday destination that offers a perfect blend of natural beauty and modern comfort. The park is meticulously maintained, with well-manicured grounds and a variety of accommodation options to suit every traveler's needs. The location is ideal, with easy access to the stunning beaches and other local attractions.

The park's facilities are top-notch, featuring a sparkling swimming pool, BBQ areas, and a well-equipped camp kitchen. The staff are friendly and attentive, always going the extra mile to ensure guests have a memorable stay. The atmosphere is relaxed and inviting, making it easy to unwind and embrace the laid-back coastal lifestyle.

Whether you're traveling with family, friends, or seeking a peaceful solo retreat, Ingenia Holliday Park caters to all. The range of activities available on-site provides plenty of entertainment, ensuring there's never a dull moment.

Overall, my experience at Ingenia Holliday Park was exceptional, and I would highly recommend it to anyone seeking a rejuvenating escape in South West Rocks."
Beds where new and comfortable. Air-conditioning worked and had fans in each room. The ladies at the front counter where helpful with the local places to eat at. Will be back

Lots of mosquitoes. Sites don’t seem to be monitored at all which was a shame as some campers don’t respect the boundaries. One dog in particular off lead, chasing the plovers and doing its business on the grass and no pick up! The pool could do with a shade cover for the very hot days we had. |Ensuite was great, clean. This is a great park with big sites but a few things let it down this time.

Van park is well kept as well as amenities. Pool area is nice with games room next to it. Walk to town about 15-20 minutes. Staff are very nice.|However it the worst place i have experienced with mosquitoes. It spoilt our stay. You can’t sit outside of an evening- you get eaten alive. Even with mozzie coils and candles. Ate inside the van every night.
Lovely place,  great location
Enjoyed a 2 night stay in a deluxe cabin. Clean with all needed items. Park well maintained with friendly staff.
There was people that came in Friday an had 2 huge dogs on fake grass section, an barking during night
Friendly, helpful and efficient staff, our deluxe cabin was clean, comfortable and nicely decorated 👍🏻

Wonderful place for the kids and parents. Super organised and structured. Nice and clean facilities, and ample space for bbq and other leisure activities. Directly placed at a river with boat ramp, invites for fishing adventures 😉. Bait sold at the reception 👍👍

Recently visited the south west rocks and stayed at Ingenia. We loved the pool and especially the water slide. The cabins have everything you needed, and the BBQ facilities were also clean which was good. I love that there is a coffee van on site in the mornings. The service from the staff is amazing- A huge thank you to Emma and Amanda for going above and beyond to help make my family holiday happen- thank you. Louise
Just great staff, kids activities, facilities

I don't even no where to begin with the horrible service.
We paid top dollar for last minute reservations (that's fine our fault)
However we stayed in a cabin and the trailer behind us had extremely enbriated guests yelling and swearing till 1.30am right next to my window. I had let the reception know and they said they forwarded the email to management. Never heard back no email no reply. Not even a sorry for this horrible experience. Did pay under $600 for 1 night, part of the housekeeping rules no noise after 9 or 10pm.
Great place to stay the river side cabins are well laid out easy walk to pubs beaches and shops

Great place for camping with kids. Camping area is far from the road and near the river. Old, but good facilities. Kitchen is basic, but has all you need - fridge, small oven, microwave.  Off season only main place of amenities is open, so you need to expect some walking to do from the tent.
Top spot great location for the kids and adults
Loved the relaxed atmosphere and location near creek, river, beach and town

We absolutely loved our stay at Ingenia SW Rocks. The location is perfect located right on Back Creek and a nice short 15 minute walk to the hub. Clean park and even cleaner amenities. Beautiful clean pool for all ages and numerous camp kitchens scattered through out. Dog friendly. Awesome fishing, swimming, kayaking. And most of all, all the staff are so lovely, happy and welcoming. Keep up the great work. We will be back. Cheers.
Fantastic location! Great facilities, clean and tidy, beautiful ensuite sites. Will definitely stay again!
Pretty good value for money. Sufficiently spaced and equipped cabins. Cleanliness could be improved, top bunks weren't as clean as bottom bunks though nothing too outrageous.
Awesome place to stay
Great pool and cabins. Clean and had everything that we needed for our stay.
Always great at Back Creek. Good facilities, friendly staff & handy location
All staff including the grounds staff were very polite and helpful.
The bed was very comfy and the place was very clean.  The bathroom and bedroom were quite compact though.

Stayed 22nd -23rd Sept.  "Bit of a Circus!" Packed to the max! Who is writing all the glowing reviews?
Avoid this place in the school holidays if you're looking for peace & quiet. We were unlucky to have to spend the 1st 2 nts of the school hols here. By Sat this large park was chockas with big noisy groups & kids everywhere: going around in packs, riding bikes non stop (even after dusk) and running through our caravan pitch. In other words, ruling the roost and out of control. Couldn't get a swim as they monopolised the heated pool. Someone was cracking a whip for a couple of hours- I rang the office & fortunately the lady came and walked around. Didn't hear whip again. Rubbery pricing figures - Fri night $71.71 & Sat night $89.89 small powered site, no river view- very expensive, didn't get value for money. Amenities messy & crowded. 20 minute walk to town- husband went through a strange area which was a dead end street of very unloved, unkempt properties. Local kids were running amok in the park near the bridge the following day. We saw some running through Ingenia - apparently there's been things stolen as we got a text saying to stow belongings.  We definitely won't be back.

We stayed in this park many years ago and it was vg then but it has been updated and is one of the better parks we have stayed in.We would give it about 8 out of 10
We will definitely be back again.
Location , service, disability access very good ...
Very clean CP and well maintained.  Staff and groundsman are very friendly and helpful.
Kylie from the office couldn't do enough for us.
Great location and dog friendly park
Stayed with a large group. The common areas were beautiful. However top bunks aren't made on arrival and one was super rickety.
we had a lovely couple of days, we were there for our granddaughters wedding. all went well until mother nature stepped in and decided to send down the rain which was much needed in the area.
Very quiet. Very helpful and friendly ground staff.
Having holidays at South West Rocks for several years now, the area has always  been quiet and it's up to you just how much you want to do or not.
Lovely large sites ..... no problems parking our "big" van..with enough room for awnings and car space.
Beautiful location, walking distance (20mins) to Town Centre, generous sites, clean amenities, friendly staff.

We enjoyed our stay - great cabin, very comfortable and clean, and even though park was busy we found it very peaceful. Though we didn't have children it looked very child friendly and there were plenty of four legged children who were all very well behaved enjoying themselves and we didn't hear any barking.

I would Highly recommend SWR caravan,l could not believe how spotless the toilets+shower are
The staff are friendly and nothing is a bother 🙂 the ground's are very clean and tidy
Thank-you Kerry-ann
Our cabin was very comfortable and affordable.

One of the best parks we have stayed in. The staff, the cleanliness, the amenities and the location are excellent.
We will definitely be back A+

Great waterfront park.. waterfront cabin was clean on the inside. Dirty on the outside. Could do away with the unhygienic , smelly carpet in bedroom. Should be durable hard floor throughout.  Useless TEAC tv . Can't  play hard drive media.
Main bedroom just a little tight.
we will come back and stay again    only the internet  Wi Fi wasn't available  this time that was disappointing
Nice relaxing place to stay
Great place to stay, our site seemed to be in a windy zone, however, the staff were terrific, good clean amenities. We would certainly stay again.

Cabin was spacious with a well equipped kitchen .We loved that we could cook on our own balcony with the electric bbq. Also enjoyed that the park is very dog friendly and close to dog beaches. Town was an easy 10-15 min walk along the river.
Immaculate park and amenities. Friendly staff. We will be back
Very peaceful camp ground outside of school holidays. Fascilities were very clean and staff very friendly. Would be a great place for young kids.
Beautiful spot and lovely staff, super clean as well!
Nice park with good facilities
Huge sites, close to river, 10 min walk to town, really friendly staff.

Great site, Great staff and service
Loved the Marine Rescue bacon & egg rolls - great idea to support local services!

We stayed on a powered caravan site. Everything was close at hand, amenity block, camp kitchen etc. You can walk into town via the river, which makes for a lovely walk. Admin staff were very friendly and helpful. All facilities were very clean, unfortunately you do have campers who leave a mess for others.
Great park close to town with friendly staff and lots of things for the kids to do.
Lovely cabins with everything that you need.
Family and pet friendly, great for fishing and easy walk to town and swimming locations.

The cabin was absolutely disgusting, there was ants and cockroaches all over the top bunk. The cleaners had supposedly just been in except it was filthy! Our kids had cockroaches crawling over them whilst they slept. The staff won’t do anything about it when you tell them they just laugh at you and say they didn’t see anything when they went in there. The main bedroom had mouldy fruit loops on the floor. They charge you $428 for two nights to sleep in a filthy cabin. Would not recommend at all!  And admin u know who I am it was under Taylah.
Lovely park. Well maintained and very clean. Lovely staff. Highly recommended.

Caravan powered ensuite site. My friend and I are in our 60's. The location was great, we have 2 dogs and within walking distance took them to off leash area where they could swim run around on the sand. We all had a great time.
For a caravan park I have a positive opinion good location good facilities toilets and showers are very clean close to beach shops can't fault it
Waterfront sites are quite large with good new slabs. Open area behind the sites down to the water really makes them huge. Loads of bird life and easy access to the town, about 800m walk.

Nice walk along the creek to go into town. Skip the first street as the walkway bridge is closed. You may have to come back to take the second street. Generous spacing in campsite, best staff, stunning scenery and reasonable pricing.

We have been here for the past few days and are very impressed with ... The service from the front office with lots of local information and map on checking.
The dog friendliness of the park.
The size and cleanliness of the amenities.
The generous sites, with artificial turf and concrete carparking pads. The numerous barbecue cabanas dotted throughout the park, as well as a well eqipped camp kitchen.
The dog wash on site is the first free one I have encountered anywhere and very handy being so close to a leash free beach.
I would definitely recommend thus camp ground to anyone and will definitely return again!
The welcome was warm, facilities are spotless & sites are roomy, many directly on the river. Not packed in like sardines. It was a good night’s sleep.
Excellent caravan park.  Great place to stay.

Was recommended to this CP, and it didn't disappoint. Great location, very pet friendly, beautiful, large caravan sites backing onto the water, and easy access to the town of South West Rocks.
We stayed for a week, and could have stayed longer. but time was against us. Would definitely recommend this place others, and will be coming back next year.
Wonderful!     A great place to stay
Will definitely be back again 💯

First visit to South West Rocks
Fantastic coastline. Great tourist info bureau.
A great place to holiday!
super spot, comfortable, big sites.
Great location, camp sites good, & cabins good got every thing you need, close to beach, river, excellent for fishing,  spot the turtle,  dolphins,  & right time of the yr. watch the whales
Great caravan park
Loved our getaway. Clean, friendly, great location to town & beaches.

This is a great caravan park.  It is in a lovely, quiet riverside location that is not far from the town centre.  The deluxe cabin that my husband and I stayed in was terrific.  It was modern and spotless.  Our double bed was very comfortable.  The wi-fi service was excellent, the kitchen was very well equiped, and the shower pressure was amazing.
Great place to stay...

We only visited a family member staying there, but the cabin they had was very nice and reasonably priced (however, it was in the off see season, you'd need to ring for quotes). There are playgrounds and a heated pool. Quite location.
Excellent clean park, great spacious sites and lovely location on the river. Short walk into beaches and town and friendly staff!
Great location  handy to town  pet friendly
Loved it. Terrific stop on the way through to the Gold Coast.
Simple and affordable accommodation at the rocks.
Great little spot for a family holiday.  Close to everything - short walks away.
Very peaceful and very friendly staff

You really get to know the quality of a place when things go wrong. It's 9pm on our first night and my 8 year old gets VERY unwell in the top bunk of the cabin. I'm talking the scene from the excorcist. Hectic.
We clean things up as best we can, make a call to the night manager and in minutes they deliver two full fresh sets of bedding and a laundy bag for the nasty stuff. They even had the presence of mind to throw in some extra towels. All that help delivered with absolute kindness and understanding.

Full marks, well played.
Well organised,efficient and friendly. The location is near the river and has beautiful views. Cabin clean and comfortable
Brilliant location  fabulous cabin, very large, spotless, comfy as bed
Brilliant location, good sized van sites ( we had an ensuite site) clean park with great amenities . Well be back!
Words fail me for this beautiful place. Weather, beaches, walks, biking, eating. Must go place

We only booked in for 3 nights but we were so impressed with the park and staff we booked for another 2 nights, and they moved other bookings just so we could stay on the same site. Very happy with this park and will tell all our friends to drop in, thanks again best wishes fred and Elaine Shield.
